titleStmt.title: SII 26.244: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 244. (A.R. No. 232 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAMĀDĒVI, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records an order of the king addressed to the servants of the deity Kulaśēkhara-īśvaramuḍaiyār of Śōḻamādēvinallūr in Karaivaḻi-ṉāḍu. It states that a certain Kāḍavarāyaṉ, a maṉṟāḍu of the village, became a traitor to the king and that his maṉṟāḍu land was forefeited to the king, and that this land was sold to the temple servants. It mentions a gift of land for rearing a flower-garden for the use of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koṉerimelkoṇṭāṉ karaivaḻiṉāṭṭu coḻamāteviṉallūr Ā(ḷ)ḷuṭaiyār kulacekharaīśvaramuṭaiyār koyilil tevakaṉmi
kaṉmika(ḷ)ḷukku ṉammolai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Ivvūr maṉṟāṭṭuka(ḷ)ḷil kāṭavarāyaṉ namakku turokiyarāy Ivaṉ maṉṟāṭṭu nammutāṉamaiyil Itteva kaṉmikaḷukku viṟṟuk kuṭut
ta maṉṟāṭṭu nilam Araikku tam carakkukku vaiytta Accu muppatum naṅkaṉmikaḷ peṟum caṉtivikkirakiraka(r)peṟum cāmaṉtarpeṟum Olaikaraṇamum Olaicciṉai karaṇammum Āka Accuṉālum Āka Iv
vaccu muppatiṉāluṅkoṇṭu Immaṉṟāṭṭu nilam Araiyiṉāl vanta vitai kalaṉe mukkuṟuṇiyum Iṉṉā(ṉa)yanāṟku tiruṉaṉtavāṉamākaviṭṭa toṭṭa vitai patakkum Āka vitai kalaṉe
ṟuṇikkum nāṉkellaiyāvatu taṭiyiraṇṭil vitai Irutūṇippatakkukku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai maṇṭakappuṟattuk kuṭakāṭamāṭitevar nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkel
lai tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukkum cāmaṉtappaṟṟukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai viraṉārāṇappallavar maṇṭalattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vayicciyakkāṇikkut teṟkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkel
laikkuṭpaṭṭa vitai Irutūṇippatakkum taṭiyiraṇṭi(la)ṉāl vitai Aiyṅkuṟuṇikku ṉāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai kāṭamparam vāykkālukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai kumaraṅkayiśvaramuṭai
yār nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kumaraṅkaīśvaramuṭaiyār nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaiyiccakkāṇikkut teṟkum Āka Iṉṉānkellaikkuṭ paṭṭa vitai Ai(ñ)ṅkuṟuṇiyum melliṭṭalil karuṅ
koṭṭaiyaṭutta toṭṭa vitai patakkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa vitai kalane Aiyṅkuṟuṇiyil yilil ṉāyakaṟku Amutupaṭikku yiyāvutāka Iṉ nilattukku Iṟai puravu ciṟṟāyam Elavai Ukavai naṅkaṉmi
kaḷpeṟum cāmantappeṟu nam Olaikkaraṇamum maṟṟum meppeṟpaṭṭatuvum Iṟukkak kaṭavatallavāka veṭṭikkoḷvārkaḷāka namolai kuṭuttom Ivai Ellāvalla coḻamuventa veḷḷān Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
